chapter_title.ar: باب وَقْتِ الْمَغْرِبِ وَ الْعِشَاءِ الْآخِرَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 6 – The time for Al Maghrib and the last Isha (Salāts)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/42)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/42)
text: قَالَ وَقْتُ الْمَغْرِبِ فِي السَّفَرِ إِلَى رُبُعِ اللَّيْلِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Salma Bin Al Khattab, from Muhammad Bin Al Waleed, from Aban Bin Usman, from Umar Bin Yazeed,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The time for Al-Maghrib during the journey is up to a quarter of the night’.
en.sarwar: 14. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Salmah ibn al-Khattab from Muhammad ibn al-Walid from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from ‘Umar ibn Yazid who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The time for al-Maghrib Salah (prayer) on a journey remains until passing of one-fourth of the night.’”
